title: piper tetragonum
intro: Piper tetragonum, also known as long pepper, is a plant species belonging to the pepper family, Piperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The long pepper plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding digestion, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Piper tetragonum can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or infusions for its medicinal and health benefits.
